name: The White House
subject: Honoring the victims in Florida
body:
1600 Daily
https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=e01fd12c4f7fe8e9f40349ac0ea6d5c9bd561916f1b18f4889b90f5032bfbd2d365af0a5c43020fe3c065e7ec6d50f1501cd88bc3cc76517

Honoring the victims in Florida

President Donald J. Trump issued a Presidential Proclamation yesterday morning in response to Wednesday’s tragic shooting at a public high school in Parkland, Florida.

“Our Nation grieves with those who have lost loved ones,” the President wrote. As a mark of solemn respect for the victims, he ordered the United States flag to be flown at half-staff at the White House, all public buildings and grounds, all military posts and naval stations, and upon all naval vessels stationed throughout the United States and its territories.

President Trump addressed the Nation shortly before 11:30 a.m. yesterday to explain the Administration’s response. “Our Administration is working closely with local authorities to investigate the shooting and learn everything we can,” he said. “We are committed to working with state and local leaders to help secure our schools, and tackle the difficult issue of mental health.”

The flag is to remain at half-staff until sunset on February 19.

https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=e01fd12c4f7fe8e9cdbc62f1b07f73f2e8ed2081130edcad0897c8e3e7cabb368c3234f4909acf382d0cda665bf81c3d53b6c91a78a6f3fa
Read the President’s full Proclamation here.

Americans are not divided on immigration

The Schumer Democrats in Congress are trying to convince Americans that the country is deeply divided on immigration reform. Outside the Beltway, the numbers tell an entirely different story.

According to a recent CBS poll, nearly three-quarters of voters favor President Trump’s
https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=d15f953220aca9da2bcab6f53c89c754fae30a252e2c5b9b92fc2e35a6f6b4fec4771b60d9dd7952cd632267422de9bf6b01aa4054b9592d
Immigration Reform and Border Security Framework. The core principles of that framework include 1) securing the border; 2) providing legal status for DACA-eligible immigrants; 3) protecting the nuclear families of immigrants; and 4) eliminating the Visa Lottery and replacing it with a system that prioritizes merit and public safety.

The CBS poll is no outlier. Polls from Harvard Harris (January 2018), Pulse Opinion Research (August 2017), and America First Policies (August 2017) all point to the same conclusion: Americans are more than ready for an immigration system that puts the national interest first once and for all.

Will our leaders in Congress listen?

https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=d15f953220aca9da731c21dec36e1e5fb577d0fa171f1cbb672018dde80ffafe8751d25f04843fb8f3b3fcb63d5a69c50353f7ac388fac1a
The bottom line: Americans overwhelmingly support President Trump’s commonsense immigration plan.

On tax reform, the good news keeps rolling in

The American people overwhelmingly support taking action to rebuild our Nation’s infrastructure—and that support spans across the partisan divide:

-
“America’s infrastructure is falling behind other nations, and it’s costing us jobs, compromising safety, and constraining economic growth,” Sen. Cory Booker (D-NJ) said in 2015.
- “Real action to streamline the permitting process will help jumpstart projects that are vital to our communities and our economy,” Speaker of the House Paul Ryan (R-WI) says.
- “It should never take more than two years to complete all federal permits required for an infrastructure project,” the U.S. Chamber of Commerce argues.

The general public agrees with these views. In a September 2017 Harvard-Harris poll, an overwhelming 84 percent of those polled believe that America needs an investment in infrastructure. Business leaders feel even more strongly: 89 percent of business owners surveyed believe infrastructure investments will improve the U.S. economy.

Read more:
https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=d15f953220aca9da7f8fda286567f3eb7fb361163fee008c59cc4777de444f960f0389eafba59526eb0893ed692c94c22d58e7bc4996d8f2
Republicans and Democrats both agree it’s time to fix America’s infrastructure.

Photo of the Day

President Donald J. Trump addresses the nation after the tragic shooting at Marjory Stoneman Douglas High School | February 15, 2018 (Official White House Photo by Shealah Craighead)

POTUS TODAY

This morning, President Trump will receive a briefing on the Marjory Stoneman Douglas High School tragedy. Later, the President will sign H.R. 582, Kari’s Law.

This afternoon, Vice President Mike Pence and Second Lady Karen Pence will travel to Texas to participate in a walking tour of the Hidalgo Texas Port of Entry and a roundtable discussion on immigration with U.S. Customs and Border Protection.

Later, the Vice President and Second Lady will participate in a boat tour of the U.S.-Mexico border on the Rio Grande and a walking tour along a bollard wall.

https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=d15f953220aca9daba1d15521c63f18512514ce60c12c0e8fcd05cf82cb6d15f009ffa6839eb234269330fb1b30e50500c5fd148edd37b13
Privacy Policy |

Contact the White House |

name: Jenny Nadicksbernd
subject: Our strategy
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Paid for by Kaine for Virginia
body:
Hey - it's Jenny, Tim's finance director. I just wanted to check in with you to make sure you'd seen the news that the Tea Party Majority Fund has started spending in Virginia. [**According to the FEC, they recently filed an expenditure of $25,000 on voter contact phone calls against Tim.**](http://salsa3.salsalabs.com/dia/track.jsp?v=2&c=vjIpej7jbUv77JsQ2i5Nky4ABVjLiCg%2F)

Our strategy for winning in November is pretty clear - we've started early, we're building out a smart infrastructure to talk to voters in every corner of the Commonwealth about the importance of re-electing Tim, we're investing in the tools and technology needed to run a 21st century campaign. And of course all of that takes significant resources - I'm so grateful for all of the support you've shown this campaign thus far.

The other key part of our strategy is being able to combat the money that's sent into Virginia by outside groups. Conservative PACs across the country want to see Tim replaced with a Republican who will support Donald Trump's extreme agenda - and they're willing to put their money where their mouths are. So we have to do the same. [**We have to keep up with them - and right now, that means matching this $25,000 investment.**](http://salsa3.salsalabs.com/dia/track.jsp?v=2&c=qQFl4MYKyOTdX%2ByPxpmDky4ABVjLiCg%2F)

I've set a goal of raising $25,000 online this week to fight back against the Tea Party Majority Fund's money. Every single dollar contributed will get us closer to that goal, and if we can harness the power of all of Tim's supporters across Virginia and the country, I really think we can do it. Can you help?

Thank you so much.

-Jenny

Jenny Nadicksbernd
Finance Director
Kaine for Virginia 2018

subject: Join the movement to end gun violence
body:
Dear Activist,

Thoughts and prayers aren't enough.

They weren't enough 19 years ago after Columbine.
After Sandy Hook.
After last month's school shooting in Kentucky.

Thoughts and prayers aren't enough for the students and their families at Marjory Stoneman Douglas High School in Parkland, Florida.

We've had enough. "Thoughts and prayers" aren't enough to honor the victims of mass shootings. What we need now is ACTION (http://act.everytown.org/sign/commit-to-vote-for-gun-safety-dems/?source=dcnp_acq18_CK-ET-GSV-DC-EM&refcode=dcnp_acq18_GSV&utm_source=dc_n_&utm_medium=_p&utm_campaign=acq18_GSV) . Lawmakers have had enough time to come around to common sense, and we are done waiting.

Frankly, it's time to throw them out, so we’re launching an action plan to kick out lawmakers beholden to the Gun Lobby — and we want you to join us (http://act.everytown.org/sign/commit-to-vote-for-gun-safety-dems/?source=dcnp_acq18_CK-ET-GSV-DC-EM&refcode=dcnp_acq18_GSV&utm_source=dc_n_&utm_medium=_p&utm_campaign=acq18_GSV) .

(http://act.everytown.org/sign/commit-to-vote-for-gun-safety-dems/?source=dcnp_acq18_CK-ET-GSV-DC-EM&refcode=dcnp_acq18_GSV&utm_source=dc_n_&utm_medium=_p&utm_campaign=acq18_GSV)

The majority of Americans support common-sense gun laws. It's time to elect leaders who share our view and will finally act to save lives from gun violence. It's time to elect gun sense candidates.

And you're the key to making that happen. Join us in this fight to end this epidemic of gun violence (http://act.everytown.org/sign/commit-to-vote-for-gun-safety-dems/?source=dcnp_acq18_CK-ET-GSV-DC-EM&refcode=dcnp_acq18_GSV&utm_source=dc_n_&utm_medium=_p&utm_campaign=acq18_GSV) .

Thank you for standing with us,

Shannon Watts
Founder,
Moms Demand Action for Gun Sense in America

subject: If we elect these women, we could flip the Senate
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the DSCC, dscc
body:
The eleven Democratic women Senators who are up for re-election are counting on your help to win -- and to send in two reinforcements to take back the Senate.
---
[](http://action.dscc. "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/wsn-2018a?refcode=DPE-20180216-ElectSW-ProsHV&recurring=auto&amounts=5,10,25,50,100,150,250&amount=5&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&addr1= &city=&state=&zip=&phone=&employer=&occupation=")
Team,

The eleven Democratic women Senators who are up for re-election are counting on your help to win in 2018 -- and to send in the reinforcements they need to take back the Senate.

That's right, if we're able to add Jacky Rosen of Nevada and Kyrsten Sinema of Arizona to their ranks, Democrats can take back the Senate in November.

But that's no small task. Re-electing all ELEVEN of our female Democratic Senators (plus two more) will take all hands on deck.

[**So we 're asking -- Can our female Senators count on you to help them win AND grow their ranks in 2018? Pitch in $1 to help the Women's Senate Network make sure all our candidates start 2018 strong.**](http://action.dscc. "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/wsn-2018a?refcode=DPE-20180216-ElectSW-ProsHV&recurring=auto&amounts=5,10,25,50,100,150,250&amount=5&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&addr1= &city=&state=&zip=&phone=&employer=&occupation=")

Democrats now have 49 Senators after Doug Jones' win in Alabama. Just imagine what it would look like if we re-elected all of our Democratic women to the Senate -- and added two more to their ranks.

**And in good news, that dream is within our grasp -- BOTH Jacky and Kyrsten 's races have officially been moved to the "Toss Up" category by the Cook Political Report.**

In the year ahead, we can either elect a record number of women to the Senate or lose nearly half the women in the Senate. What we do now to support these candidates will make all the difference on Election Day 2018.

**You can be the difference in the 2018 election. Pitch in $1 right now to help the Women 's Senate Network elect a record number of women to the Senate in 2018 -- and take back the Senate in the process:**

[**http://www.dscc.org/women-take-back-the-Senate**](http://action.dscc. "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/wsn-2018a?refcode=DPE-20180216-ElectSW-ProsHV&recurring=auto&amounts=5,10,25,50,100,150,250&amount=5&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&addr1= &city=&state=&zip=&phone=&employer=&occupation=")

Thank you,

Team DSCC

**Democratic Senatorial Campaign Committee
120 Maryland Ave. NE
Washington, DC 20002** Paid for by the DSCC, dscc.org,
and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee.
The DSCC is the only committee solely dedicated to supporting Democrats in the U.S. Senate. This message was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com because you are a part of the DSCC's grassroots network. subject: Demand action
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Andrew Gillum, Democrat, for Governor
body:
[](http://act.andrewgillum.com/page/m/fcb31a7/9e00690/42697b0f/2403b30e/3179796479/VEsH/ "https://andrewgillum.com/?utm_medium=email&utm_source=gillum&utm_content=1&utm_campaign=em18_180216_LOgun_acq_gq_act__RJG&source=em18_180216_LOgun_acq_gq_act__RJG")
Hello,

With each mass shooting, elected officials without fail offer their prayers and thoughts to the victims but refuse to stand up and do something to prevent the next one.

That's not enough, so Andrew's demanding action.

Last night, he was on MSNBC's _The Last Word with Lawrence O'Donnell_ and shared the urgency he feels as Florida's next Governor to prevent another tragedy like Marjory Stoneman Douglas High School from happening again.

**[Take a few moments this morning and watch Andrew talk about the need for gun safety reforms now, then add your name as a citizen co-signer immediately.](http://act.andrewgillum.com/page/m/fcb31a7/9e00690/42697b0f/2403b301/3179796479/VEsE/ "http://act.andrewgillum.com/page/s/add-your-name-gun-feb18?utm_campaign=em18_180216_LOgun_acq_gq_act__RJG&utm_medium=email&utm_source=Gillum&source=em18_180216_LOgun_acq_gq_act__RJG&utm_content=2+-+Take+a+few+moments+this+morning+and+watc")**

Enough is enough -- I refuse to let mass shootings be normalized, and I'm proud that Andrew is speaking out and taking proactive steps to keep not only our children, but every child, safe from senseless gun violence.

If those who offer "thoughts and prayers" are so sincere about their intent to keep our communities safe, more action needs to be taken. We must stand against the gun lobby and the Republicans who are more concerned with protecting the gun lobby than saving lives.

**[If you're with us, become a citizen co-sponsor of Andrew's plan for common-sense gun safety now so we can protect more of our children.](http://act.andrewgillum.com/page/m/fcb31a7/9e00690/42697b0f/2403b303/3179796479/VEsC/ "http://act.andrewgillum.com/page/s/add-your-name-gun-feb18?utm_campaign=em18_180216_LOgun_acq_gq_act__RJG&utm_medium=email&utm_source=Gillum&source=em18_180216_LOgun_acq_gq_act__RJG&utm_content=4+-+If+yoursquore+with+us+become+a+citizen+c")**

Thank you,

R. Jai Gillum

name: Our Revolution
subject: "We need a party that is a grassroots party..."
body:
#
> _"The time is well overdue for fundamental restructuring of the Democratic Party ... We need a Democratic Party which is not the party of the liberal elite but a party of the working class of this country. We need a party that is a grassroots party, a party where candidates are talking to working people, not spending their time raising money for the wealthy and the powerful."-Senator Bernie Sanders, Boston, March 31st, 2017._
Friends,
In order to create a political system that works for everyone, people all across the country need to get involved. One great way to start is to join your local political parties. The deadline to file for Central Committee Member is coming up on February 27. Now is the time for progressives to step up and run for leadership positions in the Democratic Party so we can create a Party that works for the community!
Join our Maryland Transform the Party team on one of the upcoming webinars to learn how you can be a part of rebuilding the Maryland Democratic Party!
[**February 16, at 7:30 PM**](https://go.ourrevolution.com/page/m/2ba7ad2e/bed43eb/49034f71/75feec81/4273919245/VEsH/ "https://zoom.us/webinar/register/WN_wWeOMZ6cQxmqZ-gn2YCv9A")
[**February 18, at 8 PM**](https://go.ourrevolution.com/page/m/2ba7ad2e/bed43eb/49034f71/75feec80/4273919245/VEsE/ "https://zoom.us/webinar/register/WN_g0k_odYEQf24XEqf2MlxXw")
If you are interested in transforming the Democratic Party from the inside, the deadline to file to be a Central Committee Member is rapidly approaching. Don't worry if this is your first time getting involved with your local party. Once you sign up you will receive a how-to document as well as links to the upcoming webinars. Our Transform the Party team in Maryland will help you every step of the way!
[**Can't make it to one of the upcoming webinars? Sign up here and you will receive all the information on how you can be a part of creating a grassroots party by becoming a central committee member!**](https://go.ourrevolution.com/page/m/2ba7ad2e/bed43eb/49034f71/75feec83/4273919245/VEsF/ "https://actionnetwork.org/forms/transform-the-party-in-maryland")
Thank you for everything you've done, and will do, for our movement. Together we will continue transforming American politics and creating a society that works for everyone, not just those at the top.
In solidarity,
The Our Revolution Organizing Team

603 2ND ST, NE
WASHINGTON, DC, 20002

Peter,

I don't know about you, but I'm ready to kick some Republicans out of Congress.

In the past year, they've tried to repeal Obamacare multiple times. They've voted to move forward a federal abortion ban.

And no matter what President Trump does, they defend him, brushing aside everything from his discriminatory immigration "plan" to his obstruction of the Russia investigation.

We've endorsed 45 pro-choice Democratic women running to help turn the House and Senate blue because they'll actually stand up to Trump, not rubber-stamp his agenda.

**[Donate $3 before midnight to become a 2018 EMILY's List member and help elect women who will stand up to the Trump agenda.](https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/m/118c56dc/24c69fd9/1187d54e5/18979133/2659667342/VEsE/ "https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/contribute/20180212_email_FebMembershipWeek?utm_medium=email&utm_source=emilyslist&utm_content=2+-+Donate+if+consinConsGroup9050+before+mid&utm_campaign=WQEFRN31N_digital_email_20180216_DefeatTheGOP_inact&source=WQEFRN31N_digital_email_20180216_DefeatTheGOP_inact")**

"I know his heart is in the right place." That's Ryan again, only this time he was excusing Trump's racist comments after the white supremacist rallies in Charlottesville, Virginia.

And let's not forget that in December Republicans passed a massive tax scam bill that gives breaks to the rich and scraps to the middle class and low-income families

Republicans in Congress may have fallen in line behind the Trump agenda, but we have dozens of pro-choice Democratic women ready to take their seats in November and stand up to Trump.

Peter -- We knew the attacks would come, and here they are. Just last week, the _Washington Examiner_ reported that "Mitch McConnell's super PAC [is targeting] Joe Donnelly in Indiana." **And now the Koch brothers just announced a $2.1 million ad buy! The floodgates for dark money in Indiana 's Senate race are wide open.**

But I'm not despairing -- far from it. I know from experience that your grassroots support can overcome millions in dark money spending. After all, in 2012, opponents put up _$18.7 million_ to defeat Joe. But we were able to beat them thanks to a strong message, persistent organizing, and monumental grassroots engagement.

**Peter, if we want to win in November, we 're going to need to build an _even bigger movement_ \-- and we can't do it without your help. Will you pitch in toward our 250 supporter mid-month goal and help us build the kind of campaign we need?**

It's no secret that Republicans want this Senate seat -- maybe more than they want any other seat in the country. And they think that anything can be theirs for the right price. But do you know what I think?

name: Russ Feingold, LegitAction
subject: BREAKING: Russians suppressed minority voters
body:
[ Legit ]LegitAction

Friend,

According to Special Counsel Robert Mueller’s brand-new indictment of
13 Russian nationals, Russia’s election attack included a coordinated
assault on American democratic legitimacy:

1. The Russians spread bogus myths about voter fraud.
2. The Russians specifically worked to suppress the votes of
minorities.

These Russian operations weren’t just focused on electing a certain
someone -- they worked to undermine the legitimacy of our very
democracy itself. And every Republican who perpetuates these myths is
helping Russia undermine American democracy.

[ https://act.legitaction.com/go/5482?t=1002&akid=625%2E356062%2E8uc3am ]LegitAction is the only organization solely dedicated to protecting
the legitimacy of our democracy. Contribute
$3 now to help us fight minority
voter suppression and myths about voter fraud.

Counsel Mueller’s newest indictment shows how direct and urgent the
threat to our democratic legitimacy is. If we don’t stop those in our
own country who are abetting it, we may not wind up with any
legitimacy left to save.

Thank you for standing up for democratic legitimacy today,

Russ Feingold

**WEEKLY NEWSLETTER**
**FRIDAY, FEBRUARY 16th**
|

**_A Note From Jeanie_**
**Dear Derek,**

**Last night I attended the Pemi-Baker Valley Republican Committee’s annual Lincoln-Reagan Day Dinner. It was a full-house and the keynote speaker was Governor Sununu, joined by Governor Phil Scott (Vermont).**
****
**What a night! What fun! What success! Republicans are winning in the Northeast that’s for sure! As Governor Sununu pointed out, for the first time in a VERY long time, Republican Governors rule (New Hampshire, Maine, Vermont, and Massachusetts).**
****
**Governor Sununu delivered outstanding remarks to an enthusiastic crowd. Of course, it was just the icing on the cake to a hugely successful State of the State speech delivered earlier to the House and Senate in Concord.**
****
**The message is this: New Hampshire Republicans are getting the job done! A balanced budget with no new taxes or fees.**
****
**Property tax relief by returning $36 million back to the cities and towns for roads and bridges and $19 million for school building aid.**
****
**Job creating tax cuts, Constitutional Carry, $5 million in higher education scholarships, elimination of over 1600 burdensome government regulations....I could go on and on, but I think you get the picture!**
****
**As we move toward the November 2018 election cycle, Republicans have much to be proud of and much success to point to. Meanwhile the Democrats continue to insist on creating new taxes and fees on hardworking taxpayers. The choice couldn’t be clearer – keep moving forward by sending Republicans back to Concord, or slide back into the reckless course Democrats seem intent on travelling.**
****

clean_body: | | nh.gop NH REPUBLICAN PARTY WEEKLY NEWSLETTER FRIDAY, FEBRUARY 16th | A Note From Jeanie Dear Derek, Last night I attended the Pemi-Baker Valley Republican Committee’s annual Lincoln-Reagan Day Dinner. It was a full-house and the keynote speaker was Governor Sununu, joined by Governor Phil Scott (Vermont). ** What a night! What fun! What success! Republicans are winning in the Northeast that’s for sure! As Governor Sununu pointed out, for the first time in a VERY long time, Republican Governors rule (New Hampshire, Maine, Vermont, and Massachusetts). Governor Sununu delivered outstanding remarks to an enthusiastic crowd. Of course, it was just the icing on the cake to a hugely successful State of the State speech delivered earlier to the House and Senate in Concord. The message is this: New Hampshire Republicans are getting the job done! A balanced budget with no new taxes or fees. Property tax relief by returning $36 million back to the cities and towns for roads and bridges and $19 million for school building aid. Job creating tax cuts, Constitutional Carry, $5 million in higher education scholarships, elimination of over 1600 burdensome government regulations....I could go on and on, but I think you get the picture! As we move toward the November 2018 election cycle, Republicans have much to be proud of and much success to point to. Meanwhile the Democrats continue to insist on creating new taxes and fees on hardworking taxpayers. The choice couldn’t be clearer – keep moving forward by sending Republicans back to Concord, or slide back into the reckless course Democrats seem intent on travelling. Take a minute now and or to the Governor, and let him know you agree that New Hampshire Republicans are getting the job done. Sincerely, Jeanie Join the Grassroots Circle! The Grassroots Circle is a unique way for you to get involved while supporting the Party. Becoming a member couldn't be easier -- join today for as little as $10 per month. There are three levels of support: The Grassroots Supporter, the NHGOP Advocate and the VIP Investor. Intern with the NH GOP! Are you a student or know a student that is interested in Politics? Learn the skills necessary to win elections and meet the Republican leaders that govern our State and write legislation.
